name: Asa Hutchinson
summary: Former Arkansas governor and 2024 Republican presidential candidate who said Trump disqualified himself because of January 6 and that Trump should not be president again.

keyStatements.quote: Trump has disqualified himself, in my judgment, from his actions on January 6th and leading up to that.
I do not believe that Donald Trump should be the next president of the United States. ... Jan. 6 really disqualifies him for the future.
keyStatements.source: ABC News (This Week) via ABC7 Chicago

keyStatements.quote: Donald Trump's actions on January 6 should disqualify him from ever being President again.
keyStatements.context: Statement on Trump being a target of the January 6 investigation

timeline.event: Said Trump 'disqualified himself' because of January 6
Statement on Trump being a target of the Jan. 6 investigation
timeline.significance: Said Trump should be disqualified from future office

credibility.background: Former Governor of Arkansas, former Homeland Security official, former U.S. Attorney
positions: Under Secretary for Border and Transportation Security, DHS (2003-2005)

oppositionReasons: Said Trump should not be president again
Said Trump's actions on January 6 should disqualify him from future office
endorsement: Said he would not support Trump in 2024
